root_text.an3.131:1.3: Mātugāmo, bhikkhave, paṭicchanno āvahati, no vivaṭo;
root_text.an3.131:1.4: brāhmaṇānaṁ, bhikkhave, mantā paṭicchannā āvahanti, no vivaṭā;
root_text.an3.131:1.5: micchādiṭṭhi, bhikkhave, paṭicchannā āvahati, no vivaṭā.
root_text.an3.131:1.6: Imāni kho, bhikkhave, tīṇi paṭicchannāni āvahanti, no vivaṭāni.
root_text.an3.131:2.1: Tīṇimāni, bhikkhave, vivaṭāni virocanti, no paṭicchannāni.
root_text.an3.131:2.3: Candamaṇḍalaṁ, bhikkhave, vivaṭaṁ virocati, no paṭicchannaṁ;
root_text.an3.131:2.4: sūriyamaṇḍalaṁ, bhikkhave, vivaṭaṁ virocati, no paṭicchannaṁ;
root_text.an3.131:2.5: tathāgatappavedito dhammavinayo, bhikkhave, vivaṭo virocati, no paṭicchanno.
root_text.an3.131:2.6: Imāni kho, bhikkhave, tīṇi vivaṭāni virocanti, no paṭicchannānī”ti.

translation_text.an3.131:1.1: “Mendicants, three things are conveyed under cover, not in the open.
translation_text.an3.131:1.3: Females are married with a veil, not unveiled.
translation_text.an3.131:1.4: Brahmin hymns are conveyed under cover, not openly.
translation_text.an3.131:1.5: Wrong view is conveyed under cover, not in the open.
translation_text.an3.131:1.6: These three things are conveyed under cover, not in the open.
translation_text.an3.131:2.1: Three things shine in the open, not under cover.
translation_text.an3.131:2.3: The moon shines in the open, not under cover.
translation_text.an3.131:2.4: The sun shines in the open, not under cover.
translation_text.an3.131:2.5: The teaching and training proclaimed by a Realized One shine in the open, not under cover.
translation_text.an3.131:2.6: These three things shine in the open, not under cover.”
